projectDescription: A template and reference implementation for building Obsidian community plugins with TypeScript, esbuild, and best-practice project structure.
keyFeatures: TypeScript-based plugin template with strict type checking
esbuild bundler configuration for fast builds and watch mode
ESLint integration with Obsidian-specific plugin rules
Plugin lifecycle management (onload/onunload) with safe listener registration
Settings tab with persistent data storage via loadData/saveData
Command palette integration with simple, editor, and conditional command types
Ribbon icon and status bar item examples
Automated version bumping with manifest.json and versions.json sync
GitHub Actions CI workflow for linting and build validation
publicApiSurface: Plugin.onload() — plugin entry point and initialization
Plugin.addCommand(command) — register a command palette entry
Plugin.addRibbonIcon(icon, title, callback) — add left ribbon icon
Plugin.registerEvent(event) — register and auto-clean workspace events
Plugin.registerDomEvent(el, type, callback) — register and auto-clean DOM events
DEFAULT_SETTINGS — default values for plugin settings
SampleSettingTab extends PluginSettingTab — settings UI component
SampleModal extends Modal — modal dialog component
